author: Alex S
subject: v2.2.3
body: ## [2.2.3](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v2.2.2...v2.2.3) (2017-11-07) ### Bug Fixes * **connectRefinementList:** add label to searched items ([#2553](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/2553)) ([ec810fa](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/ec810fa)) * **refinementList:** fix facet exhaustivity check ([#2554](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/2554)) ([0f1bf08](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/0f1bf08)), closes [#2552](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/2552) * **theme:** searchbar should have normal size input ([#2545](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/2545)) ([50d99f0](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/50d99f0))
